output:
All four checks pass.

Implemented task 2.5.3 in `bob_tools/planfile/parser.py`:
- Added `_H1_RE` recognizer for single-hash H1 headings (parser.py:74).
- Extended `parse_plan` with three prose accumulators (preamble, phase, subsection) closed at the boundary lines defined by the design doc grammar — phase/bugs heading closes preamble; first task or subsection closes phase prose; first task closes subsection prose. End-of-input also closes any still-open accumulators.
- Subsequent H1s fall through to the preamble accumulator (strict mode in Stage 3 will raise on duplicates).
- Added `_finalize_prose` helper that trims wholly-blank wrapper lines while preserving paragraph breaks and intra-line whitespace.

Added `TestParsePlanProse` in `tests/test_parser.py` covering: H1 title extraction, empty title when no H1, H2-stage-keyword does not leak to title slot, preamble between H1 and phase, multi-paragraph preamble, preamble terminated by bugs heading, phase prose ending at first task and at subsection, subsection prose, no-prose-when-task-immediately-follows, lines-before-H1 dropped, prose-after-first-task dropped, multiple phases each get their own prose, and end-of-file phase prose finalized.
